## Features

- Added an editor action button for switching the Markdown editor between the centered reading layout and a full-width layout.
- Replaced the width toggle icon with layout-oriented icons so the action reads as an editor width control rather than a window maximize control.
- Persisted the selected editor width mode in local storage so MDE restores the same centered or full-width view after refresh or relaunch.

## Bug Fixes

- Removed the action button row background and changed the action bar to shrink to the actual button group width instead of occupying the full editor row.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added focused unit coverage for editor view mode persistence and the shell-level centered/full-width toggle behavior.
- Added E2E coverage for the editor width toggle, transparent action bar background, and shrink-to-content action bar layout for CI release validation.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high` passed with no high-severity findings; npm reported existing transitive moderate `uuid` advisories through `mermaid`.
- Local E2E was not rerun by request; the release workflow will run the packaged macOS and Windows build automation from this tag.

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.2.3-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.3-mac-arm64.zip`
- macOS Intel: `MDE-1.2.3-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.3-mac-x64.zip`
- Windows x64: `MDE-1.2.3-win-x64.exe`, `MDE-1.2.3-win-x64.exe.blockmap`, `latest.yml`
